metadata.description: Agent skills for Product Manager, Engineer, QA, DevOps, Designer and Security workflows

plugins.name: pm-agent
plugins.description: Product Manager skills: idea-to-spec, competitive analysis, changelog generation, release notes, roadmap planning, and GitHub integration

plugins.name: engineer-agent
plugins.description: Engineer skills: codebase analysis, project bootstrapping, feature implementation, test writing, debugging, and delivery

plugins.name: qa-agent
plugins.description: QA skills: exploratory testing, spec-based testing, bug analysis and reporting, and regression test management

plugins.name: devops-agent
plugins.description: DevOps skills: deployment planning, CI/CD setup, environment config auditing, and incident playbook generation

plugins.name: designer-agent
plugins.description: Designer skills: UI/UX design with reference analysis and visual design system creation

plugins.name: security-agent
plugins.description: Security skills: application security checklist, authorization review, dependency audit, and privacy mapping
